_metadata.for_match: Austin FC vs Houston Dynamo FC
_metadata.competition: 2026 MLS Regular Season — Matchday 9 | Copa Tejas Round 1
_metadata.notes: Austin FC away guide. COPA TEJAS ROUND 1. Austin: 13th West, 1W-4D-4L (7pts from 9 matches), 26th in MLS xG (4.1). COPA TEJAS 2025 history: Houston won 2-0 at Austin (April 26, 2025 — Lingr 61', Ponce 79'). Houston has won at Q2 before — use this as a hook. BCS Austin preview NOT YET LIVE as of April 23 — check BCS Friday morning before pipeline. Main DP: Facundo Torres (Uruguayan, from Palmeiras, former Orlando City). Louisville beat Austin 2-1 in Open Cup R32 (April 14). Houston hosts Louisville in Open Cup R16 on April 29. Research cache expired Apr 24 — run pipeline with --fresh flag (full Sonar run ~60 min). SD result: 1-0 W, Aliyu 35' (first goal of season), second consecutive clean sheet, THIRD straight win. Houston record: 4W-0D-4L, 12 pts after 8 MLS matches. Guilherme stats: check if he scored vs SD (Aliyu was the confirmed scorer). HANDLES CONFIRMED: Herrera @h.herrera16 (1.1M, VERIFIED April 21). Guilherme @guilherme11 (VERIFIED). Facundo Torres @facundotorres10 still UNVERIFIED — needs PC scan before pipeline. Bogusz baby angle is STALE (in 3+ guides) — rotate out or reframe with fresh post if available. Kickoff time CONFIRMED: 7:30 PM CT, Apple TV.

matchday_hook: Copa Tejas Round 1 is HERE. Houston heads to Q2 Stadium on Saturday to open the Texas trophy series — and after back-to-back 1-0 wins (Orlando on Herrera's birthday 🎂, San Diego at home on Wednesday), the Dynamo are on a THREE-MATCH winning streak. Two clean sheets in a row. Ibrahim Aliyu just scored his first goal of the season. This team is clicking. Verde vs Orange. Trophy match. Road warriors. The vibe is real right now. 🧡
vibe_strip_items: 🏆 COPA TEJAS ROUND 1 — Houston and Austin fight for the Texas trophy. Verde vs Orange. It matters.
✅ San Diego result: 1-0 WIN. Aliyu 35' — first goal of the season for the Nigerian forward. Second consecutive clean sheet. THREE straight wins.
✅ Orlando result before that: 1-0 WIN. Herrera 75' on his 36th birthday. STARTED and scored.
📈 Houston record: 4W-0D-4L through 8 MLS matches. 12 points. Momentum is real.
🇳🇬 Ibrahim Aliyu — the man of the moment. Nigerian forward, 24, Kano native. Former Columbus Crew. Came back to Houston in March and just delivered his first goal of the season at the perfect time.
📈 Guilherme: 9 goal contributions (5G/4A) through 7 MLS matches. First Dynamo player to reach 9 in his first 6 MLS matches since Brian Ching in 2006 — TWENTY years.
🇺🇾 Facundo Torres (Austin DP) — 0 goals in 2026 but 3 assists. Is THIS the Copa Tejas match he finally converts? He is genuinely dangerous.
🚗 Road warriors on a THREE-MATCH win streak. Q2 Stadium has never felt so accessible.
⚽ Austin FC: 13th Western Conference, 1W-3D-3L. 26th in MLS for expected goals. The Lions are vulnerable.
🏆 April 29: Louisville City FC at Shell Energy in Open Cup R16 — Houston is two weeks away from advancing to the quarterfinal.
⚠️ Lingr SUSPENDED — red card late vs San Diego means the bicycle kick hero sits out tonight. Ennali or Ponce gets the start. Redemption arc loading?
✅ McGlynn AVAILABLE — was questionable all week but confirmed fit for Austin. The midfield engine is back.
🏟️ Austin is 5-1-1 at Q2 vs Houston all time. Houston's only win there was Sept 2024 (1-0). Last August: 2-2 comeback. Tonight without Lingr — can Aliyu or Ponce be that hero?

hot_posts.description: Nigerian forward, 24, from Kano. Scored his FIRST goal of the 2026 season in the 35th minute vs San Diego FC — the winner in a 1-0 home victory. This is his 'arrival' moment after returning to Houston from Columbus Crew in March. Look for any post-match celebration or reaction content.
hot_posts.why_it_works: First goal of the season + homecoming narrative + team win. Timing is perfect.
hot_posts.content_angle: He came back. And now he delivered. The Nigerian forward who returned home and scored when it mattered. This is the discovery framing for Austin — someone new who just proved they belong.

hot_posts.post_date: April 2026 — check for Orlando road trip content before pipeline runs
hot_posts.description: Bicycle kick in 78 seconds (Open Cup vs El Paso) — the moment that started this run. MLS Energy Moment of the Matchday.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Viral highlight. Player awareness + shareable moment. Reposts his own goals.
hot_posts.content_angle: Lead with the 78-second moment every time until something tops it.

hot_posts.post_date: April 2026 — check for post-Orlando road trip content before pipeline runs
hot_posts.description: Brazilian winger (listed as 'Augusto' on lineup cards — same person). 9 goal contributions (5G/4A) through 7 MLS matches. Pace through first 6 MLS matches broke a 20-year club record — first Dynamo player to 9 contributions in opening 6 matches since Brian Ching in 2006. Still tied for most in all of MLS. Turned 31 on April 13. Neymar publicly DMd him.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Historic pace is a shareable stat. '20-year record' is the kind of number that travels.
hot_posts.content_angle: Lead with the 20-year record. Then the birthday. Then Neymar. Individual brilliance — frame as star power, not team creator.

hot_posts.description: Baby girl due July 2026. Every road game is a countdown to being home for the birth.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Most universally relatable content angle. New parents love this.
hot_posts.content_angle: Underappreciated workhorse + new dad countdown. He works hard, Guilherme gets the glory.

hot_posts.description: Started and scored the match-winner in Orlando on his 36th birthday. Club legend returned to Houston for 2026. Mexican international, former Porto, former Atlético Madrid. Artur says they're great friends and 'he still plays at a high level.' Birthday goal in a road win — this is a gift-wrapped content moment.
hot_posts.why_it_works: 36th birthday goal on the road. Legend returns. Universal 'never stop' story.
hot_posts.content_angle: 36 and STILL doing it. Not a sub-on cameo — he STARTED and won the game. This is the main character energy for the Austin guide.

hot_posts.handle: @facutorres11 (VERIFIED — 615K followers, largest IG on Austin roster)
hot_posts.description: Uruguayan DP, 25, from Montevideo. Signed Jan 2026 from Palmeiras (4.5-year DP deal). 1G/3A in 9 matches — first Austin goal April 18. 615K Instagram followers, largest on Austin's roster. Partner: Avril Peón (Uruguayan, search 'Avril Peón Facundo Torres'). They have a daughter named Juana, born July 2023. Family man energy. Verde All Day says coach is deploying him wrong — too central, not letting him flourish.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Baby daddy from Uruguay with 615K followers and a little girl named Juana. He's the protagonist Austin wants even if their system won't let him be. Audience will want to know who he is.
hot_posts.content_angle: Enemy respect — lead with the person. Daughter Juana, partner Avril, 615K following. THEN the footballer: just scored his first Austin goal last week, finally clicking. DO NOT use 'WAG' — Avril Peón is introduced as who she is, not as 'Torres's girlfriend.'

hot_posts.description: Albanian forward, 30, born in Berat, raised in Zakynthos, Greece. 2G/2A this season. Married to Uarda Hyseni (@uarda.uzuni — model/influencer, 33K followers, baby son born April 2025). Her bio literally says 'THE PRINCE'S MOTHER.' Posted mid-slump: 'From a child with nothing! To living my dreams!' April 9 2026.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Albanian international in MLS is rare. Wife is a personality in her own right. The 'prince' baby content is universally shareable.
hot_posts.content_angle: Discovery framing — who IS this guy? Lead with Uarda (@uarda.uzuni) as the Inner Circle entry: model, 'THE PRINCE'S MOTHER,' fully integrated into Austin life. Uzuni the player: the inspirational backstory kid from Albania who made it.

hot_posts.description: American CB from Denver. Baby daughter. Into golf, community work, intellectual development. Signed extension through Dec 2026. Scored opening header vs Minnesota (Torres assist).
hot_posts.why_it_works: Family content + American story. Passes the wholesome test.
hot_posts.content_angle: Defensive anchor who is also a community guy. Respectful opponent, not a villain.

hot_posts.handle: @ennalilawrence (VERIFIED — from story itself) + @presleeclark (VERIFIED — tagged in story)
hot_posts.description: Lawrence posted an Instagram story right after the San Diego 1-0 win — pitch-side photo with Preslee Clark at Shell Energy Stadium. Caption: 'Lawrence Ennali Hallelujah!!! 🧡' with tags @ennalilawrence @houstondynamo. FRESH: posted ~11 PM CDT April 22 post-match. Source: screenshot sent directly by Charles April 23.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Posted by the player himself right after a win. Authentic, celebratory, passes the repost test (he posted it). Fresh inner circle content — Preslee at the stadium supporting him.
hot_posts.content_angle: Introduce Preslee Clark as who she IS — luxury makeup artist, @presleeclark — with relationship as one line of context. The pitch-side photo after a winning night is the vibe the guide is built on. DO NOT lead with 'his girlfriend.' Lead with Preslee Clark, the person who was there celebrating the win.

injury_flags.status: SUSPENDED — red card received late in San Diego FC match (April 22). CONFIRMED OUT for April 25.
injury_flags.impact: Major. Lingr is the bicycle kick hero, top performer. Ennali or Ponce likely fills in. Content angle: 'Who steps up in Lingr's absence?' Ponce redemption arc if he starts and scores.

injury_flags.status: AVAILABLE — confirmed fit per official Houston preview (was questionable/OUT for San Diego). Flip from prior reports.
injury_flags.impact: MF depth restored. May start alongside Samassékou.
Defensive depth affected. CB pairing adjustment.

injury_flags.status: AVAILABLE — returned vs Orlando, available for Austin.
injury_flags.impact: Depth CDM. Check if Olsen starts him.
Rookie depth defender. Low impact on starting XI.

copa_tejas_context.format: Round-robin among Texas MLS clubs. Trophy awarded at end of season.
copa_tejas_context.hook: This is not just a regular season match. The Copa Tejas is a real trophy with real bragging rights. Houston vs Austin in Austin. Verde vs Orange. Austin is 5-1-1 at home vs Houston all-time. Houston's only Q2 win was Sept 2024 (1-0 — the first ever). Last August: a 2-2 thriller where McGlynn equalized in the 89th. Tonight Lingr is suspended. Ponce or Aliyu has to be the new hero at a stadium that's never loved us back.
copa_tejas_context.houston_possession_stat: 40.9% average — lowest in MLS. Counter-punch style. Let Austin have the ball, hit on the break.
